title: Defeat by Mihawk and the Vow to Never Lose Again
situation: Zoro challenges Dracule Mihawk, is overwhelmingly defeated, yet survives after facing him head-on. In front of Luffy, he swears he will never lose again until he becomes the world's greatest swordsman.
knows: His current strength is far below Mihawk's level
Luffy has accepted him as a core crewmate
His promise to Kuina still defines his life path
does_not_know: How long the journey to surpass Mihawk will take
Future threats in the Grand Line and New World
The full scale of Luffy's eventual destiny
